description: The cross-store attribution edge that no single store produces today (ADR-2605301400 §D2 `attribution` entity class): links an on-chain subject (addr / cluster) to an off-chain object (ip-obs / dns-obs / person / org) with evidence CIDs and a confidence score, expressed as a kotoba-kqe datom and traversable via the VAET arrangement (= yabai correlate-ip-activity, 2-hop). G6 PII-ENCRYPTED: any finding whose object is a natural person, an IP, or a device fingerprint MUST set encrypted=true and carry the attribution payload under the com.etzhayyim.encrypted.* envelope (ADR-2605181100), Signal-wrapped to the authorized case-member DIDs only. R0 = schema skeleton; R1 = additionalProperties=false + encrypted-when-PII enforcement.

confidence.description: Aggregated confidence, implied unit per-mille (0..1000 = 0.000..1.000). Multi-source priority per ADR-2605152000 classify_strict. Integer per Lexicon v1 (no float).

object.description: Off-chain / cross-store object — ip-obs / dns-obs / person / org datom CID / IRI. PII objects are referenced by CID of the encrypted record (G6).

heuristic.description: Attribution heuristic (e.g. common-input-ownership / passive-dns-pivot / reuse-of-deposit-address / temporal-correlation).

caseId.description: Owning caseMandate.caseId. G3: no caseless attribution.

supersededBy.description: CID of a later finding that revises this one (append-only correction; no soft delete, G2).

encrypted.description: G6: true when objectKind ∈ {person, ip-obs, device, email} — payload under com.etzhayyim.encrypted.* Signal-wrapped to case-members (ADR-2605181100). False permitted only for public on-chain↔public-label edges.

subject.description: On-chain subject — addr or cluster datom CID / IRI (tadori:addr:* / tadori:cluster:*).

evidence.description: Evidence datom CIDs (tx / label / ip-obs) supporting the edge. Append-only (G2).

objectKind.description: Object class. person / ip-obs / device REQUIRE encrypted=true.
